title.ko: 복호화 또는 부호변환 일반(유체적 방법을 사용하는 것 F15C 4/00; 광학적 아날로그/디지털 변환기 G02F 7/00; 특수한 용도에 특히 적합한 부호화, 복호화 또는 부호변환은 관련 서브클라스 즉, GO1D, G01R, G06F, G06T, G09G, G10L, G11B, G11C, H04L, H04M, H04N을 참조:암호 또는 비밀의 필요성이 있는 기타 목적을 위한 암호화 또는 해독화 G09C)
title.en: CODING, DECODING OR CODE CONVERSION, IN GENERAL (using fluidic means F15C0004000000;optical analogue/digital converters G02F0007000000;coding, decoding or code conversion, specially adapted for particular applications, see the relevant subclasses, e.g. G01D, G01R, G06F, G06T, G09G, G10L, G11B, G11C, H04B, H04L, H04M, H04N;ciphering or deciphering for cryptography or other purposes involving the need for secrecy G09C)

definition.ko: 부호화, 복호화 일반 H03M1/00 차동 변조 H03M3/00 Keyboard와 연결 H03M11/00 변환 개개 digit의 형식 H03M5/00 digit 의 순서 H03M7/00 병렬/직렬 또는 그 역 H03M9/00 에러 검출 또는 정정 H03M13/00 이 서브 클래스의 다른 그룹으로 분류되지 않는 주제사항 H03M99/00

title.ko: 아날로그/디지털변환; 디지털/아날로그변환 (아날로그 값으로부터 차동변조에로 또는 차동변조로부터 아날로그 값으로의 변환 H03M 3/00)
title.en: Analogue/digital conversion; Digital/analogue conversion (conversion of analogue values to or from differential modulation H03M0003000000)
Reversible analogue/digital converters
using stochastic techniques

title.ko: 물리적 파라미터에 의한 바람직하지 못한 영향의 연속적인 보상, 또는 방지(주기적인 것은 1/10)
title.en: Continuously compensating for, or preventing, undesired influence of physical parameters (periodically H03M0001100000)
of noise
Calibration or testing

title.ko: 아날로그/디지털 변환기(H03M 1/02～ H03M 1/10이 우선)
title.en: Analogue/digital converters (H03M0001020000-H03M0001100000 take precedence)
Conversion in steps with each step involving the same or a different conversion means and delivering more than one bit
with scale factor modification, i.e. by changing the amplification between the steps
Automatic control for modifying the range of signals the converter can handle, e.g. gain ranging
Increasing resolution using an n bit system to obtain n + m bits, e.g. by dithering
pattern-reading type
using relatively movable reader and disc or strip
with weighted coding, i.e. the weight given to a digit depends on the position of the digit within the block or code word, e.g. there is a given radix and the weights are powers of this radix
with non-weighted coding
incremental
using cathode-ray tubes

title.ko: 아날로그 값이 기준치와 비교되는 것(H03M 1/48이 우선)
title.en: Analogue value compared with reference values (H03M0001480000 takes precedence)
simultaneously only, i.e. parallel type

title.ko: 순차적으로만 행하는 것, 즉successive approximation형(스텝마다 1bit 이상 변화 H03M 1/14)
title.en: sequentially only, e.g. successive approximation type (converting more than one bit per step H03M0001140000)
recirculation type
Sequential comparisons in series-connected stages with no change in value of analogue signal
Sequential comparisons in series-connected stages with change in value of analogue signal

title.ko: 변환기에 기준치를 제공하기 위한 D/A 변환기가 있는 것
title.en: with digital/analogue converter for supplying reference values to converter
Servo-type converters

title.ko: 시간간격에로의 중간변환을 행하는 것(H03M 1/64가 우선)
title.en: with intermediate conversion to time interval (H03M0001640000 takes precedence)
Input signal integrated with linear return to datum

title.ko: 입력신호가datum까지 선형 return으로 S/H (sampling hold)되는 것
title.en: Input signal sampled and held with linear return to datum
Input signal compared with linear ramp
Non-linear conversion
with intermediate conversion to frequency of pulses
Non-linear conversion
with intermediate conversion to phase of sinusoidal signals

title.ko: D/A 변환기(H03M 1/02～ H03M 1/10이 우선)
title.en: Digital/analogue converters (H03M0001020000-H03M0001100000 take precedence)
with conversions of different sensitivity, i.e. one conversion relating to the more significant digital bits and another conversion to the less significant bits
Automatic control for modifying converter range

title.ko: 직열연결된 단에서 순차변환을 하는 것(H03M 1/68이 우선)
title.en: Sequential conversion in series-connected stages (H03M0001680000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 동시 변화
title.en: Simultaneous conversion
using switching tree
using ladder network

title.ko: 가중된 임피던스(weighted impedance) 을 이용하는 것(H03M 1/76이 우선)
title.en: using weighted impedances (H03M0001760000 takes precedence)
with intermediate conversion to time interval
Non-linear conversion
with intermediate conversion to frequency of pulses
Non-linear conversion
Conversion of analogue values to or from differential modulation
Delta modulation, i.e. one-bit differential modulation
Differential modulation with several bits
Conversion of the form of the representation of individual digits
Conversion to or from representation by pulses
the pulses having two levels
Code representation, e.g. transition, for a given bit cell depending only on the information in that bit cell
Code representation by pulse width
Code representation by pulse frequency
Biphase level code, e.g. split phase code, Manchester code; Biphase space or mark code, e.g. double frequency code
Code representation, e.g. transition, for a given bit cell depending on the information in one or more adjacent bit cells, e.g. delay modulation code, double density code
the pulses having three levels
two levels being symmetrical with respect to the third level, i.e. balanced bipolar ternary code
the pulses having more than three levels
Conversion to or from representation by sinusoidal signals

title.ko: 정보가digit의 소정 순서 또는 수에 의하여 표현되는 부호로부터 동일한 정보를 digit의 다른 순서나 수에 의해 표현되는 부호로의 변환
title.en: Conversion of a code where information is represented by a given sequence or number of digits to a code where the same information is represented by a different sequence or number of digits

definition.ko: 그룹 H03M7/02 ~ H03M7/30에서, 최후개소 우선 규칙이 적용됩니다. 즉. 각 계층 레벨에서 반대의 표시가 없는 경우 마지막 적절한 개소에 분류됩니다.

title.en: Conversion to or from weighted codes, i.e. the weight given to a digit depending on the position of the digit within the block or code word
the radix thereof being two
the radix thereof being a positive integer different from two
the radix being ten, i.e. pure decimal code
the radix thereof being negative
having two radices, e.g. binary-coded-decimal code
Conversion to or from non-weighted codes
Conversion to or from unit-distance codes, e.g. Gray code, reflected binary code
Conversion to or from residue codes
Conversion to or from n-out-of-m codes
to or from one-out-of-m codes
Conversion to or from floating-point codes
Conversion to or from stochastic codes
Programmable structures, i.e. where the code converter contains apparatus which is operator-changeable to modify the conversion process

title.ko: 압축(영상 통신 H04N; 잉여 감축을 위한 스피치의 분석 및 합성 G10L 19/00); 신장.불필요한 데이터의 억압, 예; redundancy 감소
title.en: Compression (speech analysis-synthesis for redundancy reduction G10L0019000000;for image communication H04N); Expansion; Suppression of unnecessary data, e.g. redundancy reduction
Conversion to or from delta modulation, i.e. one-bit differential modulation
adaptive
Conversion to or from differential modulation with several bits, i.e. the difference between successive samples being coded by more than one bit
adaptive
Conversion to or from variable length codes, e.g. Shannon-Fano code, Huffman code, Morse code
using table look-up for the coding or decoding process, e.g. using read-only memory
Suppression of irrelevant zeroes
Conversion to or from run-length codes, i.e. by representing the number of consecutive digits, or groups of digits, of the same kind by a code word and a digit indicative of that kind
alternating with other codes during the code conversion process, e.g. run-length coding being performed only as long as sufficiently long runs of digits of the same kind are present
Conversion to or from non-linear codes, e.g. companding

title.ko: 병렬/직렬 변환 또는 그 역의 변환(정보가 스텝형식으로 이동하는 디지털 기억장치 G11C 19/00)
title.en: Parallel/series conversion or vice versa (digital stores in which the information is moved stepwise G11C0019000000)

title.ko: keyboard 또는 이와 유사한 장치와 관련한 부호화(keyboard 스위치장치, 부호기와 Keyboard의 구조적인 결합 H01H 13/70, H03K 17/94)
title.en: Coding in connection with keyboards or like devices, i.e. coding of the position of operated keys (keyboard switch arrangements, structural association of coders and keyboards H01H0013700000, H03K0017940000)
Details
Coding of multifunction keys
by operating the multifunction key itself in different ways
by operating selected combinations of multifunction keys
by methods based on duration or pressure detection of keystrokes
by operating a key a selected number of consecutive times whereafter a separate enter key is used which marks the end of the series
by using additional keys, e.g. shift keys, which determine the function performed by the multifunction key
wherein the shift keys are operated after the operation of the multifunction keys
wherein the shift keys are operated before the operation of the multifunction keys

title.ko: 동적 부호화, 즉 키스캐닝에 의한 것(11/26이 우선)
title.en: Dynamic coding, i.e. by key scanning (H03M0011260000 takes precedence)

title.ko: 정적부호화(H03M 11/26이 우선)
title.en: Static coding (H03M0011260000 takes precedence)
using analogue means
using opto-electronic means

title.ko: 오류 검출 또는 정정을 위한 부호화, 디코딩 또는 부호 변환; 부호화 이론의 기본 가정; 부호화 범위; 오류 확률 평가 수단 ; 채널 모델; 부호의 시험 또는 시뮬레이션 (아날로그/디지털, 디지털/아날로그 또는 코드 변환을 위한 오류 검출이나 오류 정정 H03M 1/00 ~ H03M 11/00 : 디지털 컴퓨터에 특히 적합한 것 G06F 11/08; 기록 매체와 변환기사이의 상대운동에 기반한 정보 저장을 위한 것 G11B, 예. G11B 20/18; 정적 저장을 위한 것 G11C)
title.en: Coding, decoding or code conversion, for error detection or error correction; Coding theory basic assumptions; Coding bounds; Error probability evaluation methods; Channel models; Simulation or testing of codes (error detection or error correction for analogue/digital, digital/analogue or code conversion H03M0001000000-H03M0011000000; specially adapted for digital computers G06F0011080000; for information storage based on relative movement between record carrier and transducer G11B, e.g. G11B0020180000; for static stores G11C)
Coding theory basic assumptions; Coding bounds; Error probability evaluation methods; Channel models; Simulation or testing of codes

title.ko: 데이터 표현 내 잉여에 의한 정방향 에러정정 또는 에러 탐지, 예를 들면, 소스 언어보다 더 디지트를 포함하는 코드 언어
title.en: Error detection or forward error correction by redundancy in data representation, i.e. code words containing more digits than the source words

title.ko: 블럭 코드를 이용한 것, 예를 들면, 정보 비트의 사전 결정된 수와 연결된 체크 비트의 사전 예정된 수
title.en: using block codes, i.e. a predetermined number of check bits joined to a predetermined number of information bits
Arithmetic codes
Error detection only, e.g. using cyclic redundancy check [CRC] codes or single parity bit
using multiple parity bits

title.ko: 선형 코드
title.en: Linear codes

title.ko: 순환 부호, 즉, 코드워드의 순환이동이 다른 코드워드를 산출하는 것, 예를 들면, 생성다항식에 의해 정의되는 코드, Bose-Chaudhuri-Hocquenghem [BCH] 코드 (H03M 13/17가 우선)
title.en: Cyclic codes, i.e. cyclic shifts of codewords produce other codewords, e.g. codes defined by a generator polynomial, Bose-Chaudhuri-Hocquenghem [BCH] codes (H03M0013170000 takes precedence)
Burst error correction, e.g. error trapping, Fire codes
Single error correction without using particular properties of the cyclic codes, e.g. Hamming codes, extended or generalised Hamming codes
Non-linear codes, e.g. m-bit data word to n-bit code word [mBnB] conversion with error detection or error correction
using convolutional codes, e.g. unit memory codes
Error detection or forward error correction by signal space coding, i.e. adding redundancy in the signal constellation, e.g. Trellis Coded Modulation [TCM]
using interleaving techniques
combining two or more codes or code structures, e.g. product codes, generalised product codes, concatenated codes, inner and outer codes

title.ko: 에러 탐지 또는 정정을 위한 코딩과 스펙트럼의 효율적 사용을 결합하는 것(에러 탐지나 에러 정정이 없는 경우 H03M 5/14)
title.en: combining coding for error detection or correction and efficient use of the spectrum (without error detection or correction H03M0005140000)
Synchronisation based on error coding or decoding

Unequal or adaptive error protection, e.g. by providing a different level of protection according to significance of source information or by adapting the coding according to the change of transmission channel characteristics

title.ko: H03M 13/03 ~ H03M 13/35내로 주어지는 코딩의 특정한 유형과는 무관한 디코딩 방법 또는 기술
title.en: Decoding methods or techniques, not specific to the particular type of coding provided for in groups H03M0013030000-H03M0013350000
Sequence estimation, i.e using statistical methods for the reconstruction of the original codes
using the Viterbi algorithm or Viterbi processors
Majority logic or threshold decoding

title.ko: 소프트 디코딩. 다시말해서, 심볼 신뢰 정보를 사용하는 것(H03M 13/41이 우선한다)
title.en: Soft decoding, i.e. using symbol reliability information (H03M0013410000 takes precedence)

title.ko: H03M 13/01부터 H03M 13/37내에서 주어지지 않는 정방향의 에러 보호 또는 에러 정정, 에러 탐지
title.en: Error detection, forward error correction or error protection, not provided for in groups H03M0013010000-H03M0013370000
Unidirectional error detection or correction
Constant weight codes; n-out-of-m codes; Berger codes
Codes using Fibonacci numbers series
Subject matter not provided for in other groups of this subclass
